content: Edited references/trail-schema.md: added '00-deps.json' row to directory layout diagram, added new '## 00-deps.json' section with schema block, immediately before existing '## 00-frame.json' section. Applied via targeted diff, verified via returned git-style diff showing exactly the two intended hunks.

Edited skills/orchestrator-role/SKILL.md step 1 ('Resolve dependencies'): appended two-sentence instruction to write dependency-resolver's resolution to 00-deps.json before 00-frame.json. Verified via returned diff -- single hunk, no unintended changes elsewhere in the file.

Edited checker/skills/checker-role/SKILL.md: inserted new numbered check 'Dependency-resolution-recorded' as item 3, renumbered former items 3 and 4 to 4 and 5. Verified via returned diff that the check-list is now 5 items in the intended order and no other section changed.

Appended EC-010 block verbatim (from proposed-EC-010.md) to references/earned-constraints.md under a new '## Crystallized Constraints' heading, immediately before '## How Checker Uses This Registry'. Verified via returned diff that only an insertion occurred -- no existing lines (EC-009, EC-VERIFY-FIRST-001, Seed Constraints section) were touched.
Did not touch catalog/skills.json, either marketplace.json twin, cto/skills/domain-scope/SKILL.md, or ceo/commands/evolve-colony.md, per plan step 6 (explicitly out of scope).
